data.name: EMAIL_ALREADY_REGISTERED
data.value: An account with this email address already exists.

data.name: NO_PASSWORD_SET
data.value: This account uses Google Sign-In. Please log in with Google.

data.name: INVALID_TOKEN
data.value: Your session is no longer valid. Please log in again.

data.name: TOKEN_EXPIRED
data.value: Your session has expired. Please log in again.

data.name: GOOGLE_AUTH_FAILED
data.value: Google Sign-In failed. Please try again.

data.name: SERVICE_UNAVAILABLE
data.value: An external service is temporarily unavailable. Please try again later.

data.name: MODULE_OVERLAP
data.value: The module overlaps with an existing module on this page.

data.name: MODULE_OUT_OF_BOUNDS
data.value: The module extends beyond the page boundary.

data.name: MODULE_TOO_SMALL
data.value: The module does not meet the minimum size requirements for its type.

data.name: INVALID_BUILDING_BLOCK
data.value: The content contains a building block type that is not allowed for this module type.

data.name: BREADCRUMB_CONTENT_NOT_EMPTY
data.value: Breadcrumb modules must have empty content.

data.name: DUPLICATE_TITLE_MODULE
data.value: Only one Title module is allowed per lesson.

data.name: MODULE_TYPE_IMMUTABLE
data.value: Module type cannot be changed after creation.

data.name: MALFORMED_CONTENT_JSON
data.value: The content field contains malformed or unparseable JSON.
